title: engelmannia suaveolens
intro: Engelmannia suaveolens, also known as Sweet White Top or Western Sweet White Top, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Engelmannia suaveolens can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
